beats.name: Opening Image
beats.description: A visual that sets the tone, mood, and type.

beats.name: Theme Stated
beats.description: Someone states the theme, usually to the hero.

beats.name: Setup
beats.description: Explore the hero's world, introduce key characters.

beats.name: Catalyst
beats.description: The inciting incident that disrupts the status quo.

beats.name: Debate
beats.description: The hero doubts and questions the journey ahead.

beats.name: Break into Two
beats.description: The hero makes a proactive choice to enter the new world.

beats.name: B Story
beats.description: The secondary storyline, often a love interest or mentor.

beats.name: Fun and Games
beats.description: The promise of the premise. Why we bought the ticket.

beats.name: Midpoint
beats.description: False victory or false defeat that raises the stakes.

beats.name: Bad Guys Close In
beats.description: Internal and external forces tighten around the hero.

beats.name: All Is Lost
beats.description: The opposite of the midpoint. The lowest moment.

beats.name: Dark Night of the Soul
beats.description: The hero processes loss and finds the will to continue.

beats.name: Break into Three
beats.description: Eureka moment. Hero combines A and B story insights.

beats.name: Finale
beats.description: The hero executes the new plan and defeats the opposition.

beats.name: Final Image
beats.description: The mirror of the opening image, showing how the world has changed.
